languages.text: {n}Слушая монолог Себериана, вы не успеваете проследить за его жестами — он отдает едва заметный приказ, и десятки зарядов лазружий прошивают вас насквозь.{/n}
languages.translation_comment: Убираем оружие и будем расстреляны, перезапуск таймлупа
Убираем оружие и будем расстреляны, перезапуск таймлупа

languages.text: {n}As you listen to Seberian's monologue, you fail to notice his gestures — he gives a barely perceptible sign, and dozens of lasgun charges pierce through you.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Слушая монолог Себериана, вы не успеваете проследить за его жестами — он отдает едва заметный приказ, и десятки зарядов лазружий прошивают вас насквозь.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}As you listen to Seberian's monologue, you fail to notice his gestures — he gives a barely perceptible sign, and dozens of lasgun charges pierce through you.{/n}
{n}As you listen to Seberian's monologue, you fail to notice his gestures — he gives a barely perceptible sign, and dozens of lasgun charges pierce through you.{/n}
{n}As you listen to Seberian's monologue, you fail to notice his gestures — he gives a barely perceptible sign, and dozens of lasgun charges pierce through you.{/n}

languages.text: {n}你只顾着听塞贝里安的长篇大论，却没注意到他的手势。他不露声色地示意了一下，下一瞬间，数十发激光枪子弹齐齐贯穿你的身体。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}As you listen to Seberian's monologue, you fail to notice his gestures — he gives a barely perceptible sign, and dozens of lasgun charges pierce through you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}你只顾着听塞贝里安的长篇大论，却没注意到他的手势。他不露声色地示意了一下，下一瞬间，数十发激光枪子弹齐齐贯穿你的身体。{/n}

languages.text: {n}{mf|Concentré|Concentrée} sur le monologue de Seberian, vous ne prêtez pas attention à ses gestes, et sur un signe quasi imperceptible de sa part, une dizaine de décharges de fusil laser viennent vous transpercer de part en part.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}As you listen to Seberian's monologue, you fail to notice his gestures — he gives a barely perceptible sign, and dozens of lasgun charges pierce through you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}{mf|Concentré|Concentrée} sur le monologue de Seberian, vous ne prêtez pas attention à ses gestes, et sur un signe quasi imperceptible de sa part, une dizaine de décharges de fusil laser viennent vous transpercer de part en part.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Seberian'ın monoloğunu dinlerken hareketlerini fark edemiyorsun. Neredeyse algılanamaz derecede küçük bir işaret veriyor. Onlarca silazer mermisi, vücudunu kevgire çeviriyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}As you listen to Seberian's monologue, you fail to notice his gestures — he gives a barely perceptible sign, and dozens of lasgun charges pierce through you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian'ın monoloğunu dinlerken hareketlerini fark edemiyorsun. Neredeyse algılanamaz derecede küçük bir işaret veriyor. Onlarca silazer mermisi, vücudunu kevgire çeviriyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Mientras escuchas el monólogo de Seberian, no te fijas en sus gestos. A una señal casi imperceptible, una docena de rifles láser te agujerean.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}As you listen to Seberian's monologue, you fail to notice his gestures — he gives a barely perceptible sign, and dozens of lasgun charges pierce through you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Mientras escuchas el monólogo de Seberian, no te fijas en sus gestos. A una señal casi imperceptible, una docena de rifles láser te agujerean.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Während du Seberians Monolog lauschst, achtest du nicht auf seine Gesten — und so wirst du auf ein kaum erkennbares Zeichen hin von Dutzenden Lasergewehren getroffen.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}As you listen to Seberian's monologue, you fail to notice his gestures — he gives a barely perceptible sign, and dozens of lasgun charges pierce through you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Während du Seberians Monolog lauschst, achtest du nicht auf seine Gesten — und so wirst du auf ein kaum erkennbares Zeichen hin von Dutzenden Lasergewehren getroffen.{/n}

languages.text: {n}セベリアンの独り言に耳を傾けながら、彼のジェスチャーに気づかなかった。わずかに見えるサインで、数十発のラスガン弾が貫き通した。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}As you listen to Seberian's monologue, you fail to notice his gestures — he gives a barely perceptible sign, and dozens of lasgun charges pierce through you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}セベリアンの独り言に耳を傾けながら、彼のジェスチャーに気づかなかった。わずかに見えるサインで、数十発のラスガン弾が貫き通した。{/n}
